headline: Morgan Stanley has a blunt message on S&P 500
summary: Most investors still feel like the market is fragile. Morgan Stanley thinks it is further along than they realize. In his Sunday Start note dated April 12, Morgan Stanley equity strategist Michael Wilson argued that the S&P 500 was in the process of carving out a low after hitting the bottom of ...
